title: RankPlugin
description: RankPlugin shows player ranks as PNG icons from a resource pack in both chat and the tab list, with easy configuration via ranks.yml, commands, and GUI.
body: [](https://github.com/Rbg4445/Rankplugin) ![rank1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a987c0d4150f154804db5124ade96d96f7a34b0a.png)![rank2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbacc882e09685ffe8bbed6cffe7caf9b6a86aa4.png)![tank3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6172f45d23130e2926e8ef64f374e25b320ec90.png)![rank5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d59d8b6d21e817d19da6fe18bc3ba4c3a3d434f5.png)![rank6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8d5df6ee5f26b1b75d409738a28f78abddbe0af.png)![rank7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29aaee7139c805b6ed9f0831f775ee13564764a2.png)(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d59d8b6d21e817d19da6fe18bc3ba4c3a3d434f5.png)!(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e59229c26ea582e889892fa4627d94c345909ab0.png)📌 RankPlugin – PNG Rank Display RankPlugin lets you display player ranks as PNG icons from a resource pack in both chat and the tab list. Ranks are defined in ranks.yml, can be assigned via command, or selected through a GUI. ✨ Features 📌 Show rank icons in chat 📌 Show ranks in the tab list 📌 /setrank for quick rank assignment 📌 /rankgui for GUI-based rank selection 📌 Easy customization through ranks.yml 📌 Full resource pack support with PNG icons ⚡ Installation Put the plugin .jar into your plugins folder. Restart the server. Edit plugins/RankPlugin/ranks.yml to configure your ranks. Add PNG icons for each rank in your resource pack. Test in-game using /setrank or /rankgui. 🔧 Supported Versions PaperMC / Spigot 1.20 – 1.21.x resourcepack:https://www.mediafire.com/file/m50whlt2aila2x9/RankPack.zip/file
